data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions will be tripled.
Don't miss out this chance to develop your students!

🗓️Mission Normal*3: 9/26(Mon) 19:00 – 9/30 (Fri) 18:59 (UTC)
🗓️Mission Hard*3: 9/30(Fri) 19:00 – 10/3 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
